prompt_template: You are tasked with creating a comprehensive course structure from a provided PDF document, similar to platforms like Udemy or Coursera. Follow these steps: Analyze PDF Content: Carefully read and analyze the entire PDF to thoroughly understand all concepts, topics, and details. Extract key information to ensure every and all parts of the PDF are covered. Extract Course Name and Description: Course Name: Use the main heading of the PDF as the course name. Course Description: Summarize the course content by extracting key details from the PDF. Design Lessons: Divide the PDF content into as many lessons as possible, ensuring that **there is no limit on the number of modules**. The number of modules and lessons should be based on the length of the document and all content must be captured. Divide the PDF content into small, focused learning segments (micro-lessons) of at least 3 points. For each lesson: Lesson Title: Extract from subheadings or key points in the PDF. Lesson Content: Include detailed explanations and information directly from the PDF, covering all content without adding new information. Organize Lessons into Modules: Group related lessons into broader categories (modules) based on their themes and topics. Module Titles: Choose titles that accurately reflect the collective subject matter of the grouped lessons. The number of modules must be based on the document length and all content should be represented—**there should be no limit to the number of modules**. Create Quizzes: For each lesson, develop a quiz using questions derived from the PDF content, with at least 3 questions per quiz. Each quiz should include: Questions: Clear and directly related to lesson content. Options: Multiple-choice answers. Correct Answer: Indicate the correct option. Generate JSON Output: Organize all extracted information into the following JSON format: { "course_name": "Course Name", "course_description": "Course Description", "modules": [ { "module_title": "Module Title", "module_lessons": [ { "lesson_title": "Lesson Title", "lesson_content": "Lesson Content", "quiz": [ { "question": "Question?", "options": ["Option 1", "Option 2", "Option 3"], "correct_answer": "Correct Option" } ] } ] } ] } Important Notes: Ensure all content within the PDF is accurately represented across the course structure. There should be no limit on the number of modules or lessons. Ensure that all content is captured regardless of the document's length. **Do not generate any new content—only extract and organize information from the PDF.** Maintain the sequence of the content as it appears in the PDF. The output must be a well-structured, valid JSON that does not break in the middle of the content. Ensure that your JSON is properly formatted and valid, and that the final output does not exceed the token limit of 8192 for the model "claude-3-5-sonnet-20240620". **Provide only the JSON output no additional text or explanation should be included.**
